Wedding & Reception

Menus 2027

An unforgettable evening, from the first canapé to the last dance.

Menu 1 Menu 2 Menu 3 Stations

Traiteur Beatrice

Each wedding menu is a curated journey: a cocktail hour of passed canapés followed by an elegant sit-down dinner, fully staffed and service-inclusive.

All menus include vegan and alternatives options
Guest dietary preferences collected via RSVP

Add-on · Cocktail Hour

Stations

Can be added to any wedding cocktail hour

Sea
Raw Bar — 5 Options$40 / person
  • Tuna tartare, soy-sambal, guacamole, sesame, handmade cones
  • Salmon tartare, citrus, mint, capers, Calabrian chilli, puffed quinoa, taro chips
  • Salmon crudo spritz, Aperol, prosecco, orange, yuzu, Calabrian chili, basil oil, squid ink tuile
  • Tuna crudo, citrus emulsion, chilli, dill, Cerignola olive
  • Hamachi crudo, passion fruit & yuzu vinaigrette, chive, micro flowers
  • Beef tartare, French style, with crostini
  • Carpaccio di manzo, truffle Pecorino, torched cherry tomatoes, arugula

Vegan options available  ·  Additional options upon request

Premium Options

  • Jumbo Poached Shrimp, cocktail sauce +$3.00
  • Seared Bay Scallop, prosciutto chutney +$4.00
  • Shucked Oysters, mignonette, horseradish, lemon, hot sauce +$3.00
  • Lobster Tails +$8.50
  • Crab Claw, upon availability +$4.50
  • Lobster Rolls, matane shrimp, brioche bun +$6.50
Oyster Station$18 / person
  • Shucked oysters with mignonette, horseradish, lemon, hot sauce
Antipasto
Tuscan Antipasti Station$20 / person
  • Prosciutto di Parma, bresaola & soppressata
  • Parmigiano Reggiano chunks with balsamic & olive oil
  • Duo of warm house-made focaccia with olives, chili & fresh herbs
  • Caprese spiedini — cherry tomato, mozzarella di bufala, fresh basil & olive
  • Bruschetta with crostini — onion crema, eggplant caviar
  • Marinated olives & giardiniera

Farm to Table add-on +$10  ·  Select 3:
Grilled vegetables  ·  Bitter greens salad  ·  Kale & Brussels sprout salad
Beets & green beans  ·  Burrata & heirloom tomatoes (+$5)

All options can be interchanged and menus fully customized to your preferences.
